name: VEDU PLC Law Firm and Tax Consulting
description_short: Phoenix law firm offering tax law, IRS audit defense, business law, and litigation. Founding attorney holds JD, CPA, MTAX, and EA credentials. Licensed in AZ and CA.
description_long:
VEDU PLC was founded in 2021 by Natalia A. Garrett, JD, CPA, MTAX, a Phoenix attorney with an unusually deep combination of legal and tax credentials. Before founding the firm, Garrett served at the Arizona Attorney General's Office and supervised audit teams at the Arizona Department of Revenue. She holds a law degree (2005), a Master of Taxation from ASU's W.P. Carey School of Business (2014), CPA certification (2021), and passed Enrolled Agent exams — qualifying her to represent taxpayers directly before the IRS. A second attorney, Dennis Riccio, handles real estate, property disputes, and bankruptcy law. The firm is licensed to practice in both Arizona and California.

VEDU PLC covers three intersecting disciplines under one roof: tax law and consulting, business law, and civil litigation. On the tax side, services include IRS audit representation, penalty abatement, tax strategy and litigation, and state and local tax consulting. Business clients can engage the firm for entity formation, commercial transactions, contract drafting, business dispute resolution, and fraud prevention. The firm also handles consumer rights matters, administrative law (appearances before state and federal agencies), cross-border and multi-jurisdiction issues, and bankruptcy representation through Dennis Riccio.

The firm's core differentiator is consolidating tax, business, and litigation expertise that most clients would need three separate firms to obtain. Garrett's dual status as a licensed attorney and CPA with a master's in taxation allows VEDU PLC to handle IRS disputes and tax litigation with depth that general practitioners or pure CPAs cannot match. For a firm founded in 2021, client satisfaction metrics are notably strong: a 5.0-star rating across more than 69 Google reviews and 137 Birdeye reviews as of early 2026.

VEDU PLC is a solid choice for Arizona and California individuals or businesses facing IRS audits, tax disputes, or complex multi-disciplinary legal needs. The founding attorney's credential stack — JD, CPA, MTAX, EA — is rare and well-suited to sophisticated tax representation. That said, the firm was established in 2021, giving it a shorter track record than long-tenured practices. No public fee schedule exists, so cost comparisons require a direct consultation. There is no verified BBB listing, and no client portal or mobile app has been identified.
address: 4647 N 32nd St Suite B245, Phoenix, AZ 85018
pros: Founding attorney holds rare JD + CPA + MTAX + EA combination — qualified for legal representation and direct IRS advocacy
Prior government experience at Arizona AG's Office and AZ Dept. of Revenue audit division provides insider regulatory knowledge
Licensed in both Arizona and California — broader geographic reach than most small or solo practices
Combines tax law, business law, and litigation under one firm — disciplines that typically require three separate engagements
5.0-star rating across 69+ Google reviews and 137 Birdeye reviews as of early 2026
Bankruptcy representation available through attorney Dennis Riccio for financially distressed clients
cons: Founded in 2021 — shorter track record than established tax law firms with decades of case history
No public pricing or fee schedule; costs require direct consultation before any commitment
No verified BBB listing or accreditation found as of research date
No identified online client portal or mobile app for case tracking or document management
Practice limited to Arizona and California — clients in other states must seek alternative firms
best_for: Arizona or California individuals facing IRS audits, tax penalties, or tax litigation
Small to mid-sized businesses needing integrated tax, business law, and litigation support
Clients with cross-border or multi-jurisdiction tax and compliance issues
Individuals or businesses pursuing bankruptcy protection or real estate dispute resolution
diagnosis: VEDU PLC is best suited for Arizona and California clients who need sophisticated tax legal representation — particularly IRS audit defense, penalty abatement, or tax litigation — or who want a single firm to handle overlapping tax and business law matters without retaining multiple specialists. The founding attorney's rare JD-CPA-MTAX-EA credential stack is a genuine differentiator for complex IRS and state tax disputes. The main caveats are a limited track record since 2021 and no public fee transparency, requiring prospective clients to engage directly before committing.
services: Administrative Law (State and Federal Agency Proceedings)
Real Estate Law and Property Disputes
